LanguageData.DS_MicrofilmReader.label: microfilm reader
LanguageData.DS_MicrofilmReader.description: An industrial reader that compresses written works onto strips of microfilm. Holds far more than a bookcase and still lets colonists study nearby, but only while powered.
LanguageData.DS_DigitizedIndex.label: digitized index
LanguageData.DS_DigitizedIndex.description: A double-width cabinet of indexed microfilm reels. Stores a large reference library in a compact footprint and supports nearby study, as long as it has power.
LanguageData.DS_PawnPediaTerminal.label: PawnPedia terminal
LanguageData.DS_PawnPediaTerminal.description: A searchable database terminal that surfaces exactly the right passage on demand. Its curated cross-referencing makes study noticeably more effective than browsing shelves, while powered.
LanguageData.DS_DigitalOcean.label: digital ocean
LanguageData.DS_DigitalOcean.description: A bank of high-density storage arrays holding an immense sea of digitized works. Includes a primitive assistant AI to find exactly the book you want, when you want it.
